## Safety

- [ ] Does not add generic customer-service chat scope.
- [ ] Does not add unauthorized scraping or platform control.
- [ ] Does not automate refunds, compensation, ad budgets, or irreversible actions without approval boundaries.
- [ ] Does not present demo data as production evidence.
